overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting an outdoor magical classroom at a wizarding school. Students in dark robes gather around wooden tables under a covered timber pavilion, while a professor stands near a blackboard at the front. The setting opens to a lush green forest in the background, bathed in warm morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor magical classroom under timber pavilion

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the outdoor classroom from a fixed position at the rear of the pavilion

notable_agents.action: professor in dark suit walks from the back of the classroom toward the front and exits left frame

entered.detail: large timber-framed roof structure with exposed wooden beams and rafters
dark chalkboard mounted on the front wall of the pavilion
thick wooden posts and beams supporting the pavilion roof
rustic wooden tables and benches arranged for student activities
lush green forest with tall trees visible through the open side of the pavilion
stone tile flooring covering the ground of the pavilion

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of an outdoor magical classroom set under a large timber pavilion with open sides facing a dense forest. Students in wizard robes stand around wooden tables while a professor waits near the blackboard at the front. Warm morning light filters through the structure, and a professor walks through the scene from back to front, passing between the tables before exiting the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady view of an outdoor magical classroom that remains focused on the interaction between the students and their environment under a timber pavilion. It begins with a wide perspective of the open-sided structure, where students in dark robes gather around wooden tables against a backdrop of a dense, lush forest. As warm morning light filters through the pavilion, the stillness is broken by a professor who walks from the back of the room toward the front. The camera maintains its position as the professor passes between the tables and moves toward the blackboard before finally exiting the frame.
